sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Southern Company는 2026년 1분기 매출 83억 9,700만 달러를 기록하며 판매량 증가와 천연가스 매출 상승으로 전년 대비 순이익이 소폭 개선되었습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2026년 1분기 연결 순이익은 13억 6,000만 달러로, 전년 동기 13억 3,000만 달러 대비 22백만 달러 증가했습니다.
소매 전기 매출은 46억 4,000만 달러로 전년 동기 46억 달러 대비 39백만 달러(+0.8 %) 증가했습니다.
순이익 증가는 판매량 성장, 천연가스 매출 상승, AFUDC 지분법 이익 증가가 주요 동인으로 작용했습니다.

riskChanges.text: 에너지부(DOE) 보증 하에 Alabama Power와 Georgia Power가 대규모 대출 및 채권 매입 계약을 체결하며 재무적 의무가 구체화되었습니다.
기존 10-K 공시 대비 중대한 위험 요소의 변경은 없으나, 금리 변동에 민감한 고정-고정 리셋 금리 후순위 채권 발행 등 자본 조달 활동이 지속되고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2026년 3월 31일 기준 매출 83억 9,700만 달러, 영업이익 20억 1,800만 달러를 달성했습니다.
총자산은 1,570억 3,100만 달러이며, 현금 및 현금성 자산은 9억 8,100만 달러를 보유하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 판매량 증가가 매출 성장을 견인하고 있으나, 날씨 변동성과 특정 고객군의 수요 감소가 수익성 변동성을 높이고 있어 향후 요금 조정 및 비용 회수 추이를 모니터링해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2026-03-31 revenue = 83억 9,700만 달러 (USD 8.397B; 8,397 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-31.

Quarter ended 2026-03-31 net income = 13억 5,600만 달러 (USD 1.356B; 1,356 million), XBRL range 2026-01-01..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 total assets = 1,570억 3,100만 달러 (USD 157.031B; 157,031 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 cash and cash equivalents = 9억 8,100만 달러 (USD 0.981B; 981 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-31.

Item 1A of the Form 10-K for a discussion of the risk factors of the Registrants. There have been no material changes to these risk factors from those previously disclosed in the Form 10-K. Item 5. Other Information. There were no adoptions , modifications, or terminations of "Rule 10b5-1 trading arrangements" or "non-Rule 10b5-1 trading arrangements," as defined in Item 408(a) of Regulation S-K, during the three months ended March 31, 2026 by the Registrants' directors and "officers," as defined in Rule 16a-1(f) under the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, as amended. Item 6. Exhibits. The exhibits below with an asterisk (*) preceding the exhibit number are filed herewith. The remaining exhibits have previously been filed with the SEC and are incorporated herein by reference. Net Income First Quarter 2026 vs. First Quarter 2025 (change in millions) (% change) $22 1.6 Consolidated net income attributable to Southern Company in the first quarter 2026 was $1.36 billion ($1.21 per share) compared to $1.33 billion ($1.21 per share) for the corresponding period in 2025. The increase was primarily due to increases in retail electric revenues associated with sales growth, higher natural gas revenues associated with base rate increases, higher non-fuel-related wholesale electric revenues, and an increase in AFUDC equity, partially offset by an increase in depreciation and amortization, decreases in retail electrics revenues associated with weather impacts, and an increase in interest expense. Retail Electric  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.36 billion = 13억 6,000만 달러; $1.33 billion = 13억 3,000만 달러; $22 = 22달러; $1.36 = 1.36달러; $1.21 = 1.21달러; $1.33 = 1.33달러.

Revenues In the first quarter 2026, retail electric revenues were $4.64 billion compared to $4.60 billion for the corresponding period in 2025. Details of the changes in retail electric revenues were as follows: First Quarter 2026 vs. First Quarter 2025 (change in millions) (% change) Rates and pricing $ (21) (0.5) % Sales growth 81 1.8 Weather (69) (1.5) Fuel and other cost recovery 48 1.0 Retail electric revenues $ 39 0.8 % Changes in rates and pricing resulted in a decrease in revenues in the first quarter 2026 when compared to the corresponding period in 2025 primarily due to lower contributions from commercial and industrial customers with variable demand-driven pricing at Georgia Power , partially offset by increases in PEP rates at Mississippi Power. See Note 2 to the financial statements under "Mississippi Power – Performance Evaluation Plan" in Item 8  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.64 billion = 46억 4,000만 달러; $4.60 billion = 46억 달러; $4.64 = 4.64달러; $4.60 = 4.60달러; $39 = 39달러.
